    Method
    Description
    List<Movie>
    VlsService.getAllMovies()
    Retrieves all active movies in the database regardless of genre.
    List<Movie>
    VlsServiceImpl.getAllMovies()
     
    List<Movie>
    VlsService.getBorrowedMovies(String customerName)
    Retrieves a list of movies currently borrowed (and not yet returned) by a customer.
    List<Movie>
    VlsServiceImpl.getBorrowedMovies(String customerName)
    Retrieves a list of movies currently borrowed (and not yet returned) by a customer.
    List<Movie>
    VlsService.getMoviesByGenre(String genre)
    Retrieves a list of all active movies belonging to a specific genre.
    List<Movie>
    VlsServiceImpl.getMoviesByGenre(String genre)
    Retrieves a list of all active movies belonging to a specific genre.
    List<Movie>
    VlsService.getReturnedMovies(String customerName)
    Retrieves a list of movies that a customer has previously borrowed and successfully returned.
    List<Movie>
    VlsServiceImpl.getReturnedMovies(String customerName)
    Retrieves a list of movies that a customer has previously borrowed and successfully returned.
